title: Why would the UN allow Seele to do whatever they want
display_title: Why would the UN allow Seele to do whatever they want
wikitext:
[]: Why would the UN allow Seele to do whatever they want?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:21 am Well in 2015 the UN is very powerful, and many countries have joined it. It funds Nerv, and Nerv is somehow controlled by Seele. What Seele wants is instrumantality, to say it frankly, destruction of the world. The UN isn't stupid right? And probably they know what's behind the curtain. They know what Seele is thinking. Would the various countries in the world allow Seele to play with the world in their own way? I think not. Seele wants to unify all souls which means destroying the whole human race and culture. If you look at it with another viewpoint it's just like terrorism. Won't the super powers like the US stand out and stop what Seele is trying to do?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:30 am Second Impact probably turned everything upside down. And about Seele. Think "Illuminati".

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:49 am Illuminati? What does it have to do with Seele? They've got an antimatter bomb?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:18 am Seele is a secret "Illuminati"-like organization that is not known to the public. Only some of the higher ups of Nerv are aware of it, such as Gendo and Fuyutsuki. The members of Seele are wealthy and influential members of governments around the world, and are in a distinct position to support Nerv financially. Think of Nerv as the arm of Seele. Seele's goals are quite similar to what the UN expects of Nerv, except Seele expects not just the destruction of the Angels, but also the advancement of the Human Instrumentality Project.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:42 am tinmeigut wrote: Illuminati? What does it have to do with Seele? They've got an antimatter bomb?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 31, 2006 10:48 am What you seem to miss is that SEELE controls the UN. Completely. The UN is just another extension of SEELE, like NERV. That's why SEELE was able to command the Japanese goverment like it did in 25'.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:23 pm I see. Then we're hopeless...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 31, 2006 10:18 pm tinmeigut wrote: I see. Then we're hopeless...

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 10:26 pm Yea, you convinced Keel, but there're still some other members in Seele who want to die...

Article: Why would the UN allow Seele to do whatever they want
[]: Why would the UN allow Seele to do whatever they want?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:21 am Well in 2015 the UN is very powerful, and many countries have joined it. It funds Nerv, and Nerv is somehow controlled by Seele. What Seele wants is instrumantality, to say it frankly, destruction of the world. The UN isn't stupid right? And probably they know what's behind the curtain. They know what Seele is thinking. Would the various countries in the world allow Seele to play with the world in their own way? I think not. Seele wants to unify all souls which means destroying the whole human race and culture. If you look at it with another viewpoint it's just like terrorism. Won't the super powers like the US stand out and stop what Seele is trying to do?

Only some of the higher ups of Nerv are aware of it, such as Gendo and Fuyutsuki. The members of Seele are wealthy and influential members of governments around the world, and are in a distinct position to support Nerv financially. Think of Nerv as the arm of Seele.
